use_cases: Displaying campaign ad spend trends over time in analytics dashboards
Tracking marketing budget utilization with visual daily spending patterns
Presenting marketing ROI metrics in a clean card format for stakeholder reports
Monitoring campaign performance indicators in SaaS platforms
Serving as a reusable analytics visualization component in web applications
ai_summary: A data visualization card component displaying campaign ad spend metrics over a 28-day period using an area chart. Built with Recharts for chart rendering and shadcn/ui components for the card container, badges, and tooltips. Features a clean minimalist design with cyan accent colors, designed to present marketing analytics data in a professional, digestible format suitable for SaaS and e-commerce dashboards.
